pattern: A write pointer compacts all non-target values to the front of the array in a single scan; order among kept elements may vary but the element set is deterministic.
hints: You only care about the first k elements after the function returns; anything beyond index k-1 is ignored by the judge.
Walk the array and copy each element that is not equal to val into the next available slot, advancing the slot counter.
After the scan the slot counter equals k; truncate and sort the prefix so the mutated array is in a canonical form that both solutions agree on.

edge_inputs.description: remove one of two target values
target not in array, nothing removed
single element not equal to val
all elements equal to val, result is empty
val appears once among other elements

stress.description: random array over small value range with randomly chosen val
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(0, min(size, 100))
    nums = [rng.randint(0, 50) for _ in range(n)]
    val = rng.randint(0, 50)
    return [nums, val]
